chips.plainLanguage: Keep the companion close enough to help fast.
chips.promiseText: I will stay close enough to help quickly.
chips.cautionText: Smaller spacing can make scouting slower.
chips.effectDescription: Maps directly to the follow distance threshold in meters.

chips.promiseText: I will help the player before optional tasks.
chips.cautionText: I may ignore nearby loot while danger is active.
chips.effectDescription: Raises defend and revive utility scores.

chips.plainLanguage: Notice rare loot when it is safe.
chips.promiseText: I will notice and secure rare loot more often.
chips.cautionText: I may step away for a short moment when the room is calm.
chips.effectDescription: Raises rare-loot and interest-marker utility scores.

chips.plainLanguage: Pull back before getting knocked out.
chips.promiseText: I will pull back before I get knocked out.
chips.cautionText: I may stop attacking sooner than usual.
chips.effectDescription: Raises evade utility when companion health falls.

chips.plainLanguage: Focus on safe exits when extraction starts.
chips.promiseText: I will focus on helping the team leave safely.
chips.cautionText: I may skip late optional loot when extraction starts.
chips.effectDescription: Raises extraction and cover utility near the exit.
